description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a light blue exterior and white trim, set on a green lawn with a paved driveway leading to a detached garage. The front facade is defined by a symmetrical arrangement of tall windows and a central entrance, while the rear includes a covered patio area and a distinctive bay window. The roof is flat and white, with visible interior partition walls suggesting multiple rooms. The windows are large and evenly spaced, providing ample natural light throughout the building. The detached garage is a simple rectangular structure matching the main house's color scheme. The overall design is clean and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional living space.
description: A modern, single-story light blue bungalow with a flat white roof, symmetrical windows, and a detached garage on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading to the detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated blue facade, the garage, and the paved driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bay window, covered patio area, and the garage to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows, part of the patio, and the garage in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with bay window on rear facade
